metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4021
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: Electron micrographs showing RTN4 immunoreactivity in the spinal cord motoneurons of adult rats, detected with pre-embedding immunogold-silver cytochemistry (A-C) and post-embedding immunogold cytochemistry (D). Immunogold particles indicating RTN4 immunoreactivity could be found in dendritic profiles (Den) and in close apposition to the postsynaptic density (thin arrows in A-C) and the postsynaptic dense bodies (thin arrows in C and D) at both symmetric (thick arrow in A and B) and asymmetric synapses (thick arrow in C and D).

Note on the antibody used: Antibody was generated against an RTN4 specific C-terminus 572-amino acid fragment (621-1192). The antibody is further described in PMID: 12577319.. Experimental description: Adult Sprague-Dawley rats were used for the study.
